projectDescription: A Chrome extension that lets you bulk fetch, rename, and selectively download your Sora published videos, drafts, liked videos, and cameo appearances directly from your logged-in browser session.
keyFeatures: Bulk fetch published videos, drafts, liked videos, cameo appearances, and creator feeds from a logged-in Sora session
Review and selectively download only the videos you want
Rename videos before downloading to control filenames
Download as a single ZIP archive or as individual files
Export prompts or video URLs as CSV
Sort by newest, oldest, most likes, most views, or most remixed
Search and filter your video library
Automatic update checker that self-updates the unpacked extension from GitHub releases
All data stays local — no tokens or credentials sent to external servers
Dark and light theme with fullscreen or windowed popup modes
publicApiSurface: Sources: profile (Published), drafts, likes, characters (Cameos), characterAccounts, creators
Download modes: ZIP archive, individual files
Export types: prompts CSV, URLs CSV
Sort options: newest, oldest, likes, views, remixes
chrome.storage.local settings: maxVideos, defaultSources, defaultSort, defaultResultsLayout, defaultTheme, defaultShell, downloadMode, automaticUpdatesEnabled
Background messages: FETCH, ABORT_SCAN, PAUSE_SCAN, RESUME_SCAN, DOWNLOAD_SELECTED, RESET_STATE, START_ARCHIVE_BUILD, ABORT_ARCHIVE_BUILD
Updater: automatic GitHub release checks every 30 minutes, self-patch via linked install folder
